body.title: CC walk: Igor raises consult confidence threshold 0.3→0.55
body.result: W-2 cert work covered by T-consult-confidence-gate (commit b5469f55) — abort-on-low-confidence gate at DEFAULT_MIN_CONFIDENCE=0.55; 7 tests in TestConcludeConfidenceGate. The pre-implement HIGH-inertia filter (commit f8dd2999) supplements as the cognition-bypass-advisor companion fix.
body.description:
Target: T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise. Stale proposal cleared. Affected file: cognition/consult.py — NOT HIGH-inertia.

Checklist:
1. Verify stale proposal cleared (done)
2. Set T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise priority=0.95
3. Watch Igor claim + PLAN — verify proposal touches consult.py only
4. If false brainstem/core_patterns.py proposal: note exact pe_chain log, reset, inject: 'T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise: only edit wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py constants. No brainstem files.'
5. Watch pre-flight + implementation
6. Verify commit + done

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/consult.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — scaffold this one ticket
**Test plan:** T-consult-confidence-threshold-raise done.
